title: La rosa blanca
writer: Emilio Fernández, Mauricio Magdaleno, Íñigo de Martino
actors: Roberto Cañedo, Gina Cabrera, Julio Capote
plot: For the centenary of Cuban patriot Jose Marti, the 1950s pre-Castro dictator Batista collected funds for an official film commemoration and hired renowned director Fernandez from Mexico to erect this memorial work.
